event: surgery on medial collateral ligament of right knee
TKA (Bi-Surface 5 Total Knee System) for right knee osteoarthritis
diagnosed with periprosthetic tibial fracture after TKA
right dorsalis pedis artery not palpable
transferred to emergency and critical care center
popliteal artery injury diagnosed by CTA
anastomosis between popliteal and posterior tibial arteries
internal fixation on 11th day after injury
screws inserted forwards and backwards of tibial implant keel
antibiotic treatment started on 5th day after internal fixation
exposed plate covered with gastrocnemius muscle flap after 21 days
partial weight-bearing started 3 months after surgery
bone union confirmed 5 months after surgery
